full_text:
Shi Tao (Guangyuan) 石韜 (廣元)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Shi Tao (石韜), styledGuangyuan (廣元). Old friend of Zhuge Liang. Joined Cao Cao with Xu Shu and worked on agriculture. Shi Tao was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
